title: Prosperity Client
description: The official modpack for the Prosperity Minecraft community.
body:
![Prosperity Client banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/923fdba0bff2a4e89c6cac8ac7d3353af1254caa_0.webp)

This is the official modpack for the Prosperity Minecraft server and required in order to join. 

In the coming months and years we plan on releasing impactful expansions with themed changes, much like how Mojang releases updates that target certain areas of the game. These could be themed around tech, magic, storage, The End, or even more specific things like expansions which will be useful for events.

## Troubleshooting
1. This modpack has only been tested with Fabric
2. If you need to change a mod config and wish to restore the modpack default, simply delete that mod's config file and the shipped config will be restored.
